charts.name: dev-spaces
charts.description:
Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces is a collaborative Kubernetes-native development solution that
delivers consistent developer environments on Red Hat OpenShift.

changes.description: First Release
(1.0.1) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.2) Use tpl min version 1.0.31 and tpl.isEnabled for namespace create guard
(1.0.2) CHANGELOG.md and values.schema.json for chart values validation and release notes.

charts.name: tpl
charts.description: A library that shall collect certain templates to reuse them among different charts.

changes.description: Initial release
tpl nodeSelector
tpl for sleeptimer that can be used in jobs
tpl to set nodeSelector and tolartion annoations for a namespace
new TPLs to create matchExpressions and matchLabels blocks
new TOLS additionalAnnotations and additionalLabels that allow to set annotations and labels freely on any resource.
nswitched order of tolerations
fixed issue with newline in tpl.sleeptimer
new TPLs to set securityContext and podSecurityContext
new TPLs to set podDisruptionBudget and optimized resources template and schema
new TPLs to create ArgoCD Applications
fixed issue with newline in tpl.sleeptimer
new TPL for namespace object
(1.0.27) Set Chart.yaml type to library so Helm and Artifact Hub treat tpl as a library chart
(1.0.28) Omit toleration value when operator is Exists or value is empty
(1.0.29) tpl.ttlSecondsAfterFinished for Job cleanup after completion

(1.0.30) tpl.isEnabled, tpl.argocdMetadata, tpl.jobHookMetadata, tpl.jobPodSpec, and tpl.affinity, tpl.argocdApplication finalizers render $spec.finalizers instead of root context, tpl.securityContext no longer emits fsGroup on container securityContext, tpl.podDisruptionBudget validates name, budget field, and selector; supports minAvailable 0
(1.0.31) tpl.topologySpreadConstraints, tpl.imagePullSecrets, tpl.env, tpl.envFrom, tpl.openshiftRoute, and tpl.networkPolicy
(1.0.31) tpl.jobPodSpec supports imagePullSecrets and topologySpreadConstraints
(1.0.31) tpl.namespace emits OpenShift description and display-name annotations only when set
(1.0.31) tpl.resources documents appendUnit Gi/Mi behavior; values examples use explicit units; limits.nvidia removed in favor of extendedResources map
(1.0.31) tpl.nodeSelector accepts legacy key/value or a multi-label map; tpl.jobPodSpec reuses tpl.nodeSelector

charts.name: kube-descheduler
charts.description: Setup and configure the Kube Descheduler Operator to evict pods based on specific strategies

changes.description: (1.0.0) Initial release of Kube Descheduler Operator Helm Chart
(1.0.1) - Fixed wrong text in values.yaml
(1.0.2) - Fixed typos

charts.name: collection-optional-operators
charts.description: Collection of optional operators, like CodeReadyWorkspaces without any configuration of a CRD.

changes.description: Signing Chart
README.md
(1.0.35) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.36) - Fixed dependency version

charts.name: collection-operators
charts.description: Collection of Operators which can be deployed on Demo Systems without any configuration of a CRD.

changes.description: Signing Chart
README.md
(1.0.43) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.44) - Fixed dependency version

charts.name: collection-management-operators
charts.description: Collection of management Operators which are required as a dependency for other services, such as Logging, Loki, NetObserv etc. It simply calls helper-operator to deploy all required operators without any configuration of a CRD.

changes.description: Signing Chart
redefined the management operators that shall be installed.
README.md
(1.0.54) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.55) - Fixed dependency version

charts.name: openshift-gitops
charts.description: Installs and patches the Red Hat Openshift Gitops Operator

changes.description: Signing Chart
Added customer Health Checks to Argo CD Patch-yaml
changed Argo CD CRD to v1beta1
typo in health check
cleaning up chart, added new README and tried to make more options configurable.
allowing configuration of syncwave for Argo CD object.
updated ArgoCD resource to v1beta1
added ClusterRolebinding to enable cluster-admin permissions for Argo CD in case it is enabled
fixing some default Values
added tpl chart
switching some snippets to use global tpl
it is now possible to define a global AppProject
it is now possible to define the name of a ConfigMap with the list of custom CAs, that will be used inside the Repo Pod
It is now possible to define a sidecar container for Argo CD. This is useful for post-renderer scripts for example.
Added option to define nodeSelector for ArgoCD resource
Added option to configure keycloak as SSO for argo cd
Added possibility to completely enable/disable the sso configuration.
Added possibility to configure oidcConfig for argo cd
Added possibility to define environment variables for the repo-container
Added possibility to define extraConfig settings
Added possibility to define additional labels and annotations for the namespace
Added possibility to define sharding settings for the controller
bump version
fixed default resourceExclusions for Operator openshift-gitops version 1.18.0+
fixed error in the LokiStack resource health check
disabled the gitops-application instance by default
1.1.7 - fixed resource limits and requests for CPU and be sure they are quoted
1.1.8 - added possibility to define environment variables for the controller. For example to set the sharding algorithm to round-robin.
(1.1.9) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.1.10) - Rebuild the image for CMP and published it at quay.io/tjungbau/gitops-tools:latest
(1.1.11) - Configurable controller.processors (defaults to {})
(1.1.12) - disabled the gitops-application instance by default
(1.1.13) - added Changelog

charts.name: rhacs-setup
charts.description: Master chart to deploy RHACS operator, initialize it and do some configuration using API Calls

changes.description: Signing Chart
added Readme
updated to helper-status-checker v4
documented missing centralEndpoint setting
using common tpl chart for reusablility
added option to define nodeSelector for all components
alow to configure Scanner for SecuredCluster
allowing definition of declerativeConfiguration configMaps
added support to enable scanner V4
added support to define declarative configurations including oauth providers
updated example values file
fixed yaml syntax for declarative configurations
(1.0.42) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.43) - Added .spec.customize.deploymentDefaults to SecuredCluster CRD to allow default placement on infra nodes. Contributor mcapala
(1.0.44) - Guard SecuredCluster spec.customize.deploymentDefaults so missing or empty values do not nil-deref or emit empty blocks
(1.0.45) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on setup Jobs (default 600s)
(1.0.46) - Refresh tpl dependency to 1.0.29 (Chart.lock and vendored subchart)

charts.name: quay-registry-setup
charts.description: Deploy and configure Red Hat Quay Registry.

changes.description: Signing Chart
updated to helper-status-checker v4
README
added tpl chart
using some templates
Postgres does not allow replica override.
Removed hardcoded nodeSelector from Namespace resource. This might be added later as variable
using new tpl function bindtoNode

This big update moved Config Generation into this chart and included a Job that is able to inject the certificate into the Quay configration. Moreover, any storage type is now supported to be generated by this chart.
Fixed some default configuration values
Added support for LDAP authentication, added possibility to set proxy_cache and several settings for Quotas
Added support for Github, Google, OIDC oauth, added option for Mailing configuration
Added support to configure different logging options and some additional parameters
Error in configuration file creation Job
Fixing some errors on Quay configuration rendering
Added new option repo_mirror_server_hostname to set hostname for the mirroring service
Fixed some errors in the init-quay job
Fixed issue with newline in tpl.sleeptimer
Added support for RHOCSStorage
Fixed issue with hook-delete-policy
Added support for auto-prune feature
(2.0.18) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(2.0.19) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on Quay hook Jobs (default 600s)
(2.0.20) - Refresh tpl dependency to 1.0.29 (Chart.lock and vendored subchart)

charts.name: helper-operator
charts.description: A helper Chart to reduce code repetition. This Chart should be called as a dependency by other charts in order to install Operators.

changes.description: Signing Chart
Added Job that will enable Console Plugins if they are defined.
Possibility to configure config.tolerations, config.nodeSelector and config.env for the subscription, updated inline documentation and README
Fix Job _enable_console_plugin_ in a way that it first verifies if the plugin has been added previously already and if it does not exist the Job will add it.
added dependency tp tpl library
switching some snippets to use global tpl
added trustedCA configuration for the Operator
fixed Job _enable_console_plugin_ in a way that it first verifies if the plugin has been added previously already and if it does not exist the Job will add it and leveraging helpers.tpl
added possibility to disable common labels
fixed namespace template to use the correct value for disable_common_labels
1.0.40 - added possibility to configure a custom operatorgroup name
(1.0.41) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.42) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on console-plugin Job (default 600s)
(1.0.43) - Refresh tpl dependency to 1.0.29 (Chart.lock and vendored subchart)

charts.name: helper-odf-bucket-secret
charts.description: Some services like Tempo require a secret with a specifc key for the object sotrage. When a S3 bucket is created via OpenShift Data Foundation, then this chart will help to generate a correct secret. (This is an evolution of helper-loki-bucket-secret)

changes.description: Initial release
disabled example values
cleanup and renaming
(1.0.3) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.4) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on bucket-secret Job (default 600s)
(1.0.5) - Refresh tpl dependency to 1.0.29 (Chart.lock and vendored subchart)

charts.name: helper-loki-bucket-secret
charts.description: Loki requires a secret with specific keys. This Chart creates a Job that will create such a secret based on the OpenShift Data Foundation BucketClaim.

changes.description: Initial release
removed hardcodedstring logging
added README
added dependency tp tpl library
(1.0.12) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.13) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on bucket-secret Job (default 600s)
(1.0.14) - Refresh tpl dependency to 1.0.29 (Chart.lock and vendored subchart)

charts.name: sonarqube
charts.description: A Helm chart to deploy sonarqube community edition -d epends on Sonarcube's helm chart

changes.description: initial chart
added README
added tpl chart
(1.0.29) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.30) - set set_admin_password to false by default, configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on admin-password Job via tpl.ttlSecondsAfterFinished

charts.name: rhacs-demo-applications
charts.description: DEMO ONLY — intentionally vulnerable workloads for RHACS training and demos. Not for production or shared clusters.

changes.description: Signing Chart
(1.0.9) - Maintainer email
(1.0.10) - Mark chart as demo-only in Chart.yaml and README; add not-for-production keywords

charts.name: helper-status-checker
charts.description: A helper Chart that creates a job to verify if the deployments of an operator are running. To do so it creates a service account with a role to read the status of the Deployments.

changes.description: Signing Chart
Version 4.0.0: It is now possible to use a range of status checks to verify multiple operators.
added new option subscriptionName in case the subscription name is different to the operator name
Wrong clusterrole for the installplan approver.
improved output for the installplan approver
added dependency tp tpl library
using tpl.sleeptimer now to prevent code repetition

removed the namespace from clusterrole and clusterrolebinding as it is not needed and it could cause issues. Added a check if installPlan was found for the subscription. Syncing default syncwave to 0 for all objects. Added missing delete policy to the install-approver job.
(4.0.17) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(4.0.18) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on status-check and installplan Jobs (default 600s)

charts.name: generic-cluster-config
charts.description: This Chart is responsible for deploying generic cluster configuration, for example, etcd encryption, OAuth etc.

changes.description: Possibility to configure allowed registries
added new type of etcd encryption, monitoring stack configuration etc.
README and adding possibility to configure userworkload monitoring and complete check and fixing issues
added dependency tp tpl library and allowing the configuration of a custom certificate and the audit profile for the APIServer.
using some templates
switching some snippets to use global tpl
Allowing configuration of Samples operator
Starting cleaning up monitoring configuration, so Argo CD can see if actual changes are done. fields in ConfigMap are stored in specific order
cont cleanup
cont cleanup
You can now define your external AlertManager and external Labels.
you can now define nodeExporter features and resources
configmap cleanup for user-defined monitoring. fixing order of toleration
cont cleanup
added option to configure remoteWrite
added possibility to configure the metricsServer
added possibility to configure the google openID
added possibility to configure the proxy and trusted CA. only use when you do not need username,password for the proxy
fixed some issues with the proxy and trusted CA
fixing ArtifactHub
(1.0.65) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.66) - Configurable ttlSecondsAfterFinished on etcd-encryption check Job (default 600s)

charts.name: etcd-backup
charts.description: Create a CronJob that performs ETCD Backup and stores the backup to a PV.

changes.description: Initial release
added dependency tp tpl library
added key-pruner Cronjob
(1.0.11) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(1.0.12) - Document why privileged SCC and control-plane access are required for etcd backup

charts.name: helper-argocd
charts.description: Takes care of creation of Applications, Appprojects and ApplicationSets (supporting different generators)

changes.description: support git GIT generator
Release 2.0 allows the usage of multiple sources and a releasemanagement for charts. (ie. dev install version X, prod installs version Y)
Signing Chart
Added support for Matrix Generator (opinionated)
Added support for ignoreDifferences definition in ApplicationSet
Allowing syncwave settings for Application objects
Allowing configuration of namespace for Application objects
Allowing configuration of retries in ApplicationSets
added dependency tp tpl library
AppProject has been extended to that the namespace can be defined as well.
app_project can now be correctly defined for applicationsets
merge generator can be used for applicationsets now and additional examples around git Generator
fixed an issue with the default namespace for git generator
(2.0.44) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer email
(2.0.45) - fixed an issue with the ignoreDifferences definition. You can now define the group for the ignoreDifferences definition.
